app.title: Bitlysis
app.tagline: Upload data, run analysis, track status — minimal UI, data first.

upload.label: AI chat box
upload.hint: Paste a website URL or content for AI analysis. After the result is ready, you can keep asking about the same website here.
upload.scopeNote: AI will stay focused on the website you just analyzed.
upload.placeholderAnalyze: Enter a URL or paste website content...
upload.placeholderChat: Ask AI about the website you just analyzed...

preview.title: Client preview (WASM)
preview.disclaimer: Local preview only; does not replace server profiling/analysis. WASM bundle sizes: see public/wasm-bundle-sizes.json.

job.chartSectionSubtitle: Pick a column and switch between multiple chart styles to view the data from different angles.
job.chartPanelHint: Generate multiple quick views from the same column.
job.chartEmpty: Choose a column and a chart style to see the result here.
job.chartDescBar: Compare group counts with horizontal bars.
job.chartDescPie: See each group’s share of the total at a glance.
job.chartDescLine: Track rises and drops across the sequence.
job.chartDescArea: Highlight the trend with a softer filled shape.
job.chartDescDonut: A cleaner ring-style view for proportions.
job.menuSubtitle: Click to jump between the main website analysis actions
job.menuChatHint: Jump to the chat box and command AI within the analyzed website scope
job.menuModeHint: Pick academic, marketing/SEO, or business mode
job.menuRiskScoreHint: Jump to the danger score and warning card
job.menuFindingsHint: Jump to AI findings and summary cards
job.backendSubtitle: Expose backend metadata directly instead of hiding behind UX

result.title: Structured results
result.empty: No results yet. Run analysis or wait for the job to finish.
result.chartNote: Chart payload (JSON) — for integration or export.

toast.uploadErr: Upload failed. Check format, size, and CORS/API.
toast.chartErr: Could not build a chart from the selected column.
toast.jobNotFound: Job not found or expired (retention). Upload again.
toast.rateLimit: Too many uploads. Wait and try again.
toast.network: Network error. Check NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and connectivity.
toast.exportErr: Could not download ZIP. Large ZIPs may require export/start first (see API).

errors.checkApiUrl: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to your API (e.g. staging). Restart the dev server after editing .env.local.
errors.checkCors: Ensure API_CORS_ORIGINS on the server includes your frontend origin (e.g. http://localhost:3000).
errors.checkDocs: Open /docs on the API for endpoints and error codes.
errors.openConsole: Open DevTools → Network for the full response.
